name: 21"x43" Striped Outdoor 1pc Chair Cushion Black - Threshold™
description:
Bring understated elegance to your home decor with this 1-Piece Striped Outdoor Chair Cushion from Threshold™. Made of 100% recycled polyester material with polyester filling for plush comfort, this chair seat cushion features black stripes on a white backdrop for timeless look. The zipper closure and side ties keep it in a place, while the removable cover offers convenient cleaning. Suitable for outdoor use, this fade-resistant cushion helps your space stay stylish season after season.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
